message:
perf(framebuffer): eliminate bounds checks in blit_to_painter hot path

Replace get_pixel() bounds-checked access with direct pixels[] indexing
and point_colored(i32,i32) with point_colored_at_index_in_bounds(usize).
Precompute fb_row_start and painter_row_start outside inner loop. Loop
bounds already guarantee in-bounds access, making the checks redundant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
